title: SA Police report to coroner into Somerton Man case complete 'very soon'
author: Ethan Rix
primary_or_secondary: Secondary reporting with direct Abbott statements and SAPOL position
reliability: High for current official-process status; medium for Abbott's account of expected timing
notes: ABC reports SAPOL had not yet presented report to coroner; Abbott says police told him it would be soon.

title: Body of Somerton Man exhumed, South Australia
author: South Australia Police / Mirage News republication
primary_or_secondary: Primary official release republished by media site
reliability: High for exhumation/FSSA intent; use original SAPOL URL if accessible
notes: Records official exhumation, Operation Persevere/Persist and planned DNA recovery attempts.

title: Somerton Man identified as Melbourne electrical engineer, researcher says
author: Daniel Keane; Gabriella Marchant
reliability: High for Abbott announcement; not official identity determination
notes: Reports Abbott's claim that the man was Carl Charles Webb using DNA from hairs in the plaster bust.

title: The DNA, the code and the conspiracies - your top questions answered
author: Bridget Judd
primary_or_secondary: Secondary reporting with direct expert statements
reliability: Medium-high; expert statements but not formal lab report
notes: Explains genetic genealogy workflow, Keane match pathway, GEDmatch and continuing uncertainty.

title: The Somerton Man has been named. What do we know about Carl 'Charles' Webb?
author: Rebecca Opie
reliability: Medium; direct civil records should be acquired separately
notes: Summarizes Webb birth, marriage, occupations, case chronology and Thomson/Jestyn timeline.

title: Is Carl Webb really the Somerton Man and if so, was he a spy?
author: ABC News
reliability: Medium; useful for conflict mapping, not proof of alternative theory
notes: Records Gordon Cramer's concerns and SAPOL/coroner formal-determination boundary.

title: What do we know about Carl Webb? Researchers find ads, photographs
author: ABC News
notes: Reports possible John Keane clothing link, family photos and handwriting lead.

title: Somerton Man Charles Webb's true identity revealed in family photographs and divorce papers
author: Ben Cheshire
primary_or_secondary: Secondary reporting with family album and divorce-file material
reliability: Medium-high for family-photo existence; direct documents still needed
notes: Reports family photographs and divorce-paper evidence; says Webb finding remained unverified by SAPOL.

title: Somerton Man, Australia's Oldest Cold Case, Solved with DNA from a Single Hair
author: Astrea Forensics
primary_or_secondary: Primary/participant account, not official police/coroner record
reliability: Medium-high for lab-process claim; lacks formal peer-reviewed/public validation
notes: States DNA was extracted, sequenced and genotyped at Astrea from a single 5 cm rootless hair strand.

title: Somerton body inquest
author: Unknown reporter
reliability: Medium-high for contemporary public record; lower than transcript
notes: Reports opening inquest, non-natural/poison language and murder not ruled out.

title: Somerton body for burial
author: Unknown reporter
notes: Reports embalmed body, fingerprint circulation and failure to identify body before burial.

title: Torn book gives new hope in body case
author: Unknown reporter
reliability: Medium-high for contemporary Rubaiyat lead; needs police-file confirmation
notes: Reports book finder, torn page, phone numbers and capital-letter sequence not deciphered.

title: EX-OFFICER FOUND - AND HIS RUBAIYAT
author: Unknown reporter
reliability: Medium-high for Boxall clue public reporting
notes: Reports the Boxall/Jestyn-related clue broke down after Sydney detectives located Boxall.

title: Advertising - divorce notice to Carl Webb
author: Dorothy Jean Webb / solicitor notice
reliability: High for existence of public divorce notice; not proof of Somerton identity alone
notes: Public notice says Dorothy Jean Webb instituted divorce proceedings against Carl Webb, formerly of Bromby Street, South Yarra, then parts unknown.

title: 'But what poison?' Mystery of the Somerton Man
author: State Records of South Australia
reliability: High for repository holdings; medium for narrative summary
notes: States State Records holds open 1949 coroner file, not police files because the case remains open; later inquest restricted.

title: The Enduring Mystery of the Somerton Man
author: Mike Dash; updated by Meilan Solly
reliability: Medium; useful synthesis, not primary proof
notes: Updated synthesis notes Webb identification claim and continued official non-finality as of update.
